series_metadata.series_title: Official Register of Licensees by Licens
series_metadata.series_description: Provides name, address, business address, and license status for each licensed or permit holding therapist. Register is finalized at the end of every licensing year. New copy is ran each quarter for updated information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy all precceding quarterly registers for each licensing year. Retain final register in office for five years, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
